
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|qid=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they are in the relationship of {{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}} (Earth overcomes Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất

==Years of Yang Water Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 2 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=Year|1=Year}} of Jinshitsu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Jinshitsu'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|2 AD|ja|2年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=AD 2|qid=Q19647}}
* {{ill|AD 62|en|AD 62|qid=Q30406|lt=62 AD|1=AD 62}}
* {{ill|AD 122|en|AD 122|qid=Q30658|lt=122 AD|1=AD 122}}
* {{ill|182|en|182|qid=Q31393|lt=182 AD|1=182}}
* {{ill|242|en|242|qid=Q30952|lt=242 AD|1=242}}
* {{ill|302|en|302|qid=Q32261|lt=302 AD|1=302}}
* {{ill|362|en|362|qid=Q32851|lt=362 AD|1=362}}
* {{ill|422|en|422|qid=Q30906|lt=422 AD|1=422}}
* {{ill|482|en|482|qid=Q32534|lt=482 AD|1=482}}
* {{ill|542|en|542|qid=Q33631|lt=542 AD|1=542}}
* {{ill|602|en|602|qid=Q30586|lt=602 AD|1=602}}
* {{ill|662|en|662|qid=Q31127|lt=662 AD|1=662}}
* {{ill|722|en|722|qid=Q23542|lt=722 AD|1=722}}
* {{ill|782|en|782|qid=Q30550|lt=782 AD|1=782}}
* {{ill|842|en|842|qid=Q24730|lt=842 AD|1=842}}
* {{ill|902|en|902|qid=Q23587|lt=902 AD|1=902}}
* {{ill|962|en|962|qid=Q23568|lt=962 AD|1=962}}
|
* {{ill|1022|en|1022|qid=Q19261|lt=1022 AD|1=1022}}
* {{ill|1082|en|1082|qid=Q19452|lt=1082 AD|1=1082}}
* {{ill|1142|en|1142|qid=Q19614|lt=1142 AD|1=1142}}
* {{ill|1202|en|1202|qid=Q5226|lt=1202 AD|1=1202}}
* {{ill|1262|en|1262|qid=Q5510|lt=1262 AD|1=1262}}
* {{ill|1322|en|1322|qid=Q5770|lt=1322 AD|1=1322}}
* {{ill|1382|en|1382|qid=Q6335|lt=1382 AD|1=1382}}
* {{ill|1442|en|1442|qid=Q6411|lt=1442 AD|1=1442}}
* {{ill|1502|en|1502|qid=Q6137|lt=1502 AD|1=1502}}
* {{ill|1562|en|1562|qid=Q6621|lt=1562 AD|1=1562}}
* {{ill|1622|en|1622|qid=Q6815|lt=1622 AD|1=1622}}
* {{ill|1682|en|1682|qid=Q7648|lt=1682 AD|1=1682}}
* {{ill|1742|en|1742|qid=Q7575|lt=1742 AD|1=1742}}
* {{ill|1802|en|1802|qid=Q6883|lt=1802 AD|1=1802}}
* {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862 AD|1=1862}}
* {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922 AD|1=1922}}
* {{ill|1982|en|1982|qid=Q2436|lt=1982 AD|1=1982}}
|
* {{ill|2042 AD|ja|2042年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2042|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2042 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2102 AD|ja|2102年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2102|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2102 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2100年代|1=2100s|qid=Q1209304}}
* {{ill|2162 AD|ja|2162年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2162|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2162 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2222 AD|ja|2222年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2222|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2222 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2282 AD|ja|2282年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2282|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2282 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2342 AD|ja|2342年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2342|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2342 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2402 AD|ja|2402年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2402|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2402 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2462 AD|ja|2462年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2462|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2462 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2522 AD|ja|2522年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2522|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2522 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2582 AD|ja|2582年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2582|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2582 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2642 AD|ja|2642年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2642|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2642 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2702 AD|ja|2702年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2702|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2702 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2762 AD|ja|2762年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2762|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2762 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2822 AD|ja|2822年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2822|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2822 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2882 AD|ja|2882年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2882|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2882 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2942 AD|ja|2942年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2942|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2942 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|qid=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|qid=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|qid=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Water Dog|qq=ja|壬戌|version=84123859|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q904937|af|Waterhond (astrologie)|cdo|Ìng-sáe̤k|de|Wasser-Hund|hak|Ngìm-sut|ja|壬戌|ko|임술|vi|Nhâm Tuất|za|Nyaemzswt|zh-min-nan|Jîm-sut|zh-yue|壬戌|zh|壬戌|zh-min-nan|Pêng-chún|zh-yue|丙子|cdo|Bîng-cṳ̄de|nds|Feuer-Röttvi|de|Yang Water Dog|fr|Chien de eau|af|Vuurrat (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Ratteen|en|Fire Rat|fr|Rat de feushak|it|Bing-chṳ́id|ko|병자|vi|Bính Tý|za|Bingceij|zh|丙子|ar|Yang Water Dog}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
